c.d: Total number of monthly active users on the platform
c.s: App store analytics, company reports, third-party research

c.d: Quality and reliability of live streaming capabilities including video quality, latency, and stability
c.s: User reviews, technical specifications, performance tests

c.d: Number and effectiveness of interactive features like comments, reactions, polls, and chat
c.s: Feature documentation, user feedback, platform analysis

c.d: Availability and variety of revenue generation methods for live streamers
c.s: Platform policies, creator program documentation, revenue reports

c.d: Effectiveness of the platform's algorithm in promoting live content to relevant audiences
c.s: Creator testimonials, engagement metrics, algorithm transparency reports
